design_philosophy: Bloomberg-terminal energy. Maximum data density, pure function-first execution. Muted dark surfaces with accents strictly reserved for semantic financial meaning (Gains = Green, Losses = Red). High contrast, precise, objective.

rules.headings: Chivo, font-weight 700, tight tracking (tracking-tight), never centered for data views.
rules.body: IBM Plex Sans, font-weight 400 or 500, leading-relaxed for reading, leading-snug for data rows.
rules.numbers: CRITICAL: ALL prices, percentages, timestamps, and RR ratios MUST use IBM Plex Mono (font-mono) to ensure tabular alignment and precise scanability.

spacing_and_layout.density: Dense. Use tighter padding (p-3, p-4) to maximize visible data on a single screen without scrolling.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Strict grid-cols-12 hierarchy. Watchlist (col-span-3 or 4), Main Content/Charts (col-span-8 or 9).
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Cardless design. Flat rectangular areas delineated by 1px borders (border-border). No drop shadows, use background lightness steps instead.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: All textual data left-aligned. All numerical data (prices, %) right-aligned for easy vertical scanning.

buttons.primary: Flat solid background (brand_action #00E5FF), text-black, rounded-none or rounded-sm, hover:opacity-90.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px border border-border, text-primary, hover:bg-surface_hover.

badges.long: text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 bg-[rgba(0,230,118,0.1)] text-[#00E676] border border-[rgba(0,230,118,0.2)] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
badges.short: text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 bg-[rgba(255,59,48,0.1)] text-[#FF3B30] border border-[rgba(255,59,48,0.2)] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
badges.neutral: text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 bg-surface_active text-secondary rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider

tables.style: border-collapse, dense rows (py-2), subtle border-b border-border on rows, hover:bg-surface_hover.
tables.headers: text-xs uppercase text-secondary font-medium pb-2 border-b-2 border-border

cards_signals.style: p-4 border border-border bg-surface hover:border-secondary transition-colors rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-3
cards_signals.data_rows: flex justify-between items-center text-sm border-b border-border/50 pb-1 last:border-0

motion.interactions: Minimal and instantaneous. 150ms transitions on hovers. No bouncy animations.
motion.data_updates: When LTP or signals change, implement a subtle background flash (green for uptick, red for downtick) that fades out over 500ms.

testing_attributes.rule: CRITICAL: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.

empty_states.description: Abstract dark financial chart to be used as a low-opacity background for empty 'No live signals' state.
empty_states.usage: Apply low opacity (opacity-20) and grayscale, overlay with text 'Waiting for next setup...'.
Use as a small, rounded placeholder image when the Trade Log is completely empty, alongside prompt 'No trades executed yet.'.

icons.style: Use 'regular' or 'bold' weight. Avoid duotone for data-heavy dashboard.
icons.usage: Use TrendUp/TrendDown for %, Crosshair for targets, ShieldCheck for Stoploss.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind with the specific hex codes for background (#0A0A0C), surface (#121215), and semantic colors (#00E676, #FF3B30).
Install Google Fonts 'Chivo', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono'.
Ensure the layout feels like a command center: dense, screen-filling, with clear boundaries (1px borders) between widgets.
Implement the Watchlist as a sidebar or fixed grid on the left, and Signals Feed/Charts on the right.
Use semantic colors STRICTLY for meaning: Green for gains/LONG, Red for losses/SHORT. Do not use them for decorative elements.
Ensure all numerical outputs (prices, percentages, time) wrap in a component or span that uses the 'font-mono' class.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, tab, and row for testing.
